stemHtml: You are flying to an airport which is located on the coast at the sea level of a Norwegian fjord (a long narrow inlet of the sea). You can expect the approach to the aerodrome to be affected by sea smoke under the following conditions.

options.a:
Surface air temperature -5°C
500 ft temperature +5°C
Water temperature +10°C
options.b:
Surface air temperature -5°C
500 ft temperature 0°C
Water temperature +10°C
options.c:
Surface air temperature -5°C
500 ft temperature -5°C
Water temperature +10°C
options.d:
Surface air temperature +5°C
500 ft temperature 0°C
Water temperature -10°C
